text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm walking through<n>the Tracen
Academy school building...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Zoinks!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: P-pard'n me! I was just spac'n out a<n>bit...
choice_data_list: You seem kinda down. Something wrong?
You seem kinda down. Something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Y-you could tell just by look'n?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Well, actually, some folks from my<n>hometown are
pay'n me a visit soon.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
We're hav'n a scrimmage, so they<n>said they'd
come t'cheer me on...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm pleased as punch about<n>them com'n,
but...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
The race is gonna have Oguri and all<n>kinds of
talented racers running in it,<n>so I don't know how
well I'll be able<n>t'do.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
They're com'n from so far away to<n>cheer me
on... I just hope I don't<n>disappoint them...

Even if Yukino Bijin's concerns are<n>warranted,
letting her anxieties get<n>the better of her would
defeat the<n>purpose of the race. But just as
about I'm about to tell her this...

What's this?! My class rep senses<n>detect a
worried student!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yukino! So YOU'RE the source of the<n>distress
signal!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You can't fool your class<n>representative! If
something's on<n>your mind, then TALK TO ME!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Huh? What?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see! I understand your concerns<n>very well...
VERY WELL INDEED!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As everyone's class representative, I<n>will train
you myself!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
To win a race, all you've gotta do is<n>train! You
there! Trainer! You're with<n>me, right?!
choice_data_list: Yeah! Show us your grit, Class Rep!
Yeah! Show us your grit, Class Rep!
Yeah! Show us how a class rep runs!
Yeah! Show us how a class rep runs!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
To win a race, all you've gotta do is<n>train! You
there! Trainer! You're with<n>me, right?!
choice_data_list: Yeah! Show us your grit, Class Rep!
Yeah! Show us your grit, Class Rep!
Yeah! Show us how a class rep runs!
Yeah! Show us how a class rep runs!

text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O's perpetual<n>boldness is
definitely a strength of<n>hers in races as well.

With a little of that tenacity, Yukino<n>Bijin might be
able to race to the best<n>of her abilities regardless
of who<n>she's up against. I explain this to her,
and...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
You're right! My nerves've gotten<n>the better of
me in a bunch of past<n>races! I couldn't even run
properly!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see! Then you really do need your<n>class
representative to help you out!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
With that settled, let's head over to<n>the perfect
training spot!

Although Sakura Bakushin O is full of<n>confidence,
a sense of unease<n>compels me to tag along with
them.

Sakura Bakushin O brings us out to<n>the central
plaza.

A reporter from a magazine is<n>interviewing
students passing by.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Special Feature: Word from Tracen<n>Academy!
Let's have them interview<n>us too!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Your training begins NOW, Yukino! If<n>you can
answer the questions with<n>confidence here, then
you've surely<n>got grit worthy of a class rep too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My running philosophy? Well, it's to<n>set a good
example and run each<n>race in a manner worthy
of a class<n>representative!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
A-as for me, um... it'd be nice if I<n>looked as cool
as the others when I<n>run...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no! I sense that you're holding<n>back,
Yukino!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You need to reveal more of your inner<n>feelings!
Don't you want to bring<n>honor to your
hometown?!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: My hometown...

text_block_list.name: Older Lady
text_block_list.text:
Give it your all, Yukino! Show those<n>city racers
what you can do!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Thanks for com'n to see me off,everyone! You've even made asnazzy bann'r for me... Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna become a real strong<n>Umamusume!
One you'll all be proud<n>of!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(That's right... I wanna show 'em<n>I've become a
city girl too!)

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I wanna run a race that'll make all the<n>folks from
my hometown real proud!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I wanna show them all that I can<n>shine just as
bright as the city girls!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hehe, now that was aninterview! You fully expressed howyou feel about your hometown andracing!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I remembered someth'n important<n>back there...
and I guess it gave me<n>the courage I needed!

Sakura Bakushin O's spirited running<n>and
perfectly timed bursts of speed<n>are amazing.

I tell Yukino that if she can learn from<n>Bakushin
O's running, her strategy<n>repertoire will expand,
giving her the<n>edge in races.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, exactly! EXACTLY! You've got a<n>real
discerning eye on you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Leave everything to me! Starting<n>today, your
running abilities will be<n>class rep-level too!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Z-zowie, sounds like I'll be a force to<n>be
reck'ned with... Thanks so much!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! It's all in a day's work for<n>a class
representative! All right! Get<n>changed and I'll see
you at the track!

Although Sakura Bakushin O is full of<n>confidence,
a sense of unease<n>compels me to tag along with
them.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now then, let's start with some
class-representative-style SHUTTLE<n>RUNS!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
While running back and forth, we<n>shout energetic
phrases at the top of<n>our lungs! This lets us
muster more<n>energy and speed than normal!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: R-really? Okay, um...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Rock 'n roll!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! And remember,<n>you're
competing with my gusto as<n>well!

And with that, Yukino Bijin and<n>Sakura Bakushin
O push through their<n>class-representative-style
training.

While a lot of the training exercises<n>come out of
left field, they all help<n>Yukino Bijin to learn
Sakura Bakushin<n>O's running style.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huff... wheeze... All that's left isthe final exercise to wrap things up.
choice_data_list: You should rest for a bit first.
You should rest for a bit first.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... gasp... Y-you're right.Let's take a break.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Still, it's pretty impressive that you<n>managed to
keep up with my training<n>exercises!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... well, you did a tee-rific job of<n>teach'n
me your runn'n style!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now then, time for the final training<n>exercise! Run
however you please<n>toward the setting sun!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Sweating and gritting your teeth while<n>showing
real guts... A class<n>representative must embody
the spirit<n>of youth!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If you set your heart aflame with that<n>fiery
fighting spirit you've gained,<n>you'll be able to
win any race!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I see! I think I've seen a scene like<n>that in a TV
show rerun!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I'll be just like the characters in that<n>show... All
right! Time to rock 'n roll!
